/usr/bin/cc -Wimplicit-fallthrough=3 -g CMakeFiles/ethics_demo.dir/ethics_demo.c.o -o ethics_demo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/build/lib: ../lib/libnimcp.so.2.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -llz4 -ljansson -lcjson -latomic /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcufft.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurand.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcusolver.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcublas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libculibos.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcublasLt.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcusparse.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnvJitLink.so -lsodium /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
